memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 Channel)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_IntResetInternalFIFOWidth

briefdescription.para: Set the correct FIFO width for current mixer & rate change settings (int).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 0 for actual FIFO 1 for obs FIFO.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 DecimationFactor, u32 Channel)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDecimationFactorInt

briefdescription.para: This function is to set the decimation factor and also update the FIFO write words w.r.t to decimation factor for both the actual and observtion FIFOs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
to be set for DAC block. XRFDC_INTERP_DECIM_* defines the valid values.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 DecimationFactor)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDecimationFactor

briefdescription.para: This API is to set the decimation factor and also update the FIFO write words w.r.t to decimation factor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
to be set for DAC block. XRFDC_INTERP_DECIM_* defines the valid values.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 DecimationFactor)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetDecimationFactorObs

briefdescription.para: This API is to set the decimation factor and also update the FIFO write words w.r.t to decimation factor for the observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
to be set for DAC block. XRFDC_INTERP_DECIM_* defines the valid values.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 Event)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_UpdateEvent

briefdescription.para: This function will trigger the update event for an event.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is for which dynamic update event will trigger. XRFDC_EVENT_* defines the different events.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 InterpolationFactor)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetInterpolationFactor

briefdescription.para: This API is to set the interpolation factor and also update the FIFO read words w.r.t to interpolation factor.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
to be set for DAC block. XRFDC_INTERP_DECIM_* defines the valid values.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *InterpolationFactorPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetInterpolationFactor

briefdescription.para: Interpolation factor are returned back to the caller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the interpolation factor for DAC blocks.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *DecimationFactorPtr, u32 Channel)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDecimationFactorInt

briefdescription.para: Decimation factor are returned back to the caller for both actual and observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the Decimation factor for DAC blocks.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *DecimationFactorPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDecimationFactor

briefdescription.para: Decimation factor are returned back to the caller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the Decimation factor for DAC blocks.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *DecimationFactorPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetDecimationFactorObs

briefdescription.para: Decimation factor are returned back to the caller for the observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the Decimation factor for DAC blocks.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u16 Mode)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetInvSincFIR

briefdescription.para: This API is used to set the mode for the Inverse-Sinc filter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 0(disable), 1(1st Nyquist zone) and 2(2nd Nyquist zone).

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if block not enabled/invalid mode.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u16 *ModePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetInvSincFIR

briefdescription.para: This API is used to get the Inverse-Sinc filter mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is a pointer to get the inv-sinc status. valid values are 0(disable), 1(1st Nyquist zone) and 2(2nd Nyquist zone).

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_IsDACDigitalPathEnabled

briefdescription.para: Checks whether DAC Digital path is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return 1 if DAC digital path is enabled, otherwise 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_IsADCDigitalPathEnabled

briefdescription.para: Checks whether ADC digital path is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3 in DAC/ADC-2GSPS and 0-1 in ADC-4GSPS.

listitem.para: Return 1 if ADC digital path is enabled, otherwise 0.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_CheckDigitalPathEnabled

briefdescription.para: Checks whether ADC/DAC Digital path is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: XRFDC_SUCCESS if Digital path is enabled.
XRFDC_FAILURE if Digital path is not enabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u16 FabClkDiv)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetFabClkOutDiv

briefdescription.para: This API is to set the divider for clock fabric out.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
to be set for a tile. XRFDC_FAB_CLK_* defines the valid divider values.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u16 *FabClkDivPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFabClkOutDiv

briefdescription.para: This API is to get the divider for clock fabric out.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is a pointer to get fabric clock for a tile. XRFDC_FAB_CLK_* defines the valid divider values.

simplesect.para: API is applicable for both ADC and DAC Tiles

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 FabricWrVldWords)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetFabWrVldWords

briefdescription.para: Fabric data rate for the requested DAC block is set by writing to the corresponding register.

detaileddescription.para: The function writes the number of valid write words for the requested DAC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is write fabric rate to be set for DAC block.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 FabricRdVldWords, u32 Channel)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetFabRdVldWordsInt

briefdescription.para: Fabric data rate for the requested ADC block is set by writing to the corresponding register.

detaileddescription.para: The function writes the number of valid read words for the requested ADC block. This is for both the actual and observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is Read fabric rate to be set for ADC block.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 FabricRdVldWords)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetFabRdVldWords

briefdescription.para: Fabric data rate for the requested ADC block is set by writing to the corresponding register.

detaileddescription.para: The function writes the number of valid read words for the requested ADC block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is Read fabric rate to be set for ADC block.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 FabricRdVldWords)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetFabRdVldWordsObs

briefdescription.para: Fabric data rate for the requested ADC block is set by writing to the corresponding register.

detaileddescription.para: The function writes the number of valid read words for the requested ADC block. This is for the observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
is Read fabric rate to be set for ADC block.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *FabricWrVldWordsPtr, u32 Channel)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFabWrVldWordsInt

briefdescription.para: This function returns the the number of fabric write valid words requested for the block.

detaileddescription.para: For ADCs this is for both the actual and observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the fabric data rate for DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *FabricWrVldWordsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFabWrVldWords

briefdescription.para: This API returns the number of fabric write valid words requested for the block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the fabric data rate for DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *FabricWrVldWordsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFabWrVldWordsObs

briefdescription.para: This API returns the number of fabric write valid words requested for the block.

detaileddescription.para: This is for the observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the fabric data rate for DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *FabricRdVldWordsPtr, u32 Channel)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFabRdVldWordsInt

briefdescription.para: This function returns the number of fabric read valid words requested for the block.

detaileddescription.para: For ADCs this is for both the actual and observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the fabric data rate for ADC/DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *FabricRdVldWordsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFabRdVldWords

briefdescription.para: This API returns the number of fabric read valid words requested for the block.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the fabric data rate for ADC/DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id, u32 *FabricRdVldWordsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFabRdVldWordsObs

briefdescription.para: This function returns the number of fabric read valid words requested for the block.

detaileddescription.para: This is for the observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.
Pointer to return the fabric data rate for ADC/DAC block

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, int Tile_Id, u8 Enable, u32 Channel)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetupFIFOInt

briefdescription.para: Enable and Disable the ADC/DAC FIFO.

detaileddescription.para: For ADCs this is for the actual and observtion FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (FIFO enable) and 0 (FIFO Disable)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, int Tile_Id, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetupFIFO

briefdescription.para: Enable and Disable the ADC/DAC FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (FIFO enable) and 0 (FIFO Disable)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, int Tile_Id, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetupFIFOObs

briefdescription.para: Enable and Disable the ADC/DAC FIFO.

detaileddescription.para: For ADCs this is for the observtion FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (FIFO enable) and 0 (FIFO Disable)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, int Tile_Id, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetupFIFOBoth

briefdescription.para: Enable and Disable the ADC/DAC FIFO.

detaileddescription.para: Thisis for the actual and observtion FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (FIFO enable) and 0 (FIFO Disable)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u8 *EnablePtr, u32 Channel)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFIFOStatusInt

briefdescription.para: Current status of ADC/DAC FIFO.

detaileddescription.para: For ADCs this is for both the actual and observations FIFOs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (FIFO enable) and 0 (FIFO Disable)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u8 *EnablePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFIFOStatus

briefdescription.para: Current status of ADC/DAC FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (FIFO enable) and 0 (FIFO Disable)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u8 *EnablePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFIFOStatusObs

briefdescription.para: Current status of ADC/DAC FIFO.

detaileddescription.para: This is for the observation FIFO.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
valid values are 1 (FIFO enable) and 0 (FIFO Disable)

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_ResetInternalFIFOWidth

briefdescription.para: Set the correct FIFO width for current mixer & rate change settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 0-3.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_ResetInternalFIFOWidthObs

briefdescription.para: Set the correct Observation FIFO width for current mixer & rate change settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 0-3.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_GetFabClkFreq

briefdescription.para: Get Fabric Clock frequency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return Fabric Clock frequency for ADC/DAC tile

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Block_Id)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_IsFifoEnabled

briefdescription.para: Get whether FIFO is enabled or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is ADC/DAC block number inside the tile. Valid values are 0-3.

listitem.para: Return 1 if FIFO is enabled, otherwise 0.
